data.content: Approved shipment review on main/origin/main at 4221f588dd03. Verified commit:b359e0f813ca is tagged on the knot, scripts/setup.sh uses KNOWN_AGENTS=(claude codex gemini opencode) and labels opencode as OpenCode, matching src/lib/settings.ts SCANNABLE_AGENTS. GitHub Actions runs for CI, Changesets, and Coverage Badge completed successfully on 4221f588dd03. Local bash -n scripts/setup.sh passed; bunx tsc --noEmit in a clean review worktree surfaced unrelated existing main-branch module-resolution/type errors outside this change, but no regression attributable to b359e0f813ca was found.
